case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING LLC VS. LIZBETH DELGADILLO ET AL

docket_entries.description: RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO ALAMEDA COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT DELGADILLO, LIZBETH

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT DELGADILLO, LIZBETH DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-11-2020

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $447.95 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 64814764) AS TO DEFENDANT DELGADILLO, LIZBETH
